items: 1.01 Entry into a Material Definitive Agreement
headline: DefenseTech Corp. awarded $850 million multi-year contract by U.S. Department of Defense; represents ~28% of trailing-twelve-month revenue
body: DefenseTech Corp. (NYSE: DFTC) today announced that it has been awarded a multi-year contract by the United States Department of Defense valued at up to $850 million over a five-year period. The contract is for the development, integration, and sustainment of next-generation autonomous logistics systems. Initial obligation of $215 million has been authorized for the first program year, with additional task orders to be issued on an annual basis subject to appropriations. The Company estimates the contract represents approximately 28% of its trailing-twelve-month revenue and is expected to be modestly accretive to earnings in fiscal 2025 and meaningfully accretive thereafter. Work will be performed primarily at the Company's facilities in Massachusetts and Virginia. The contract award follows a competitive procurement process. Management will discuss the contract during its previously scheduled Investor Day on September 24, 2024.
